title: AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind
summary: Showcase how CodeGrind's AI assistant helps learners tackle DS&A challenges in real-time with guided hints and model switching.
core_message: CodeGrind combines LeetCode-style problems with Azure OpenAI-powered guidance, giving learners dynamic problem-solving help, multiple model options, and an integrated editor to practice and learn faster.
cta: Try a new AI-assisted problem now and compare how different models influence your approach.
visual_brief: A short screen-recorded flow: user opens a DS&A problem in CodeGrind, AI assistant panel appears with model toggle (GPT-4o/GPT-3.5), hints unfold step-by-step, code editor updates in real-time, ending with a quick summary of solution approach and a prompt to try another model.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind brings AI-assisted problem solving to DS&A practice. See real-time hints, model switching (GPT-4o vs GPT-3.5), and an integrated editor that updates as you work through a LeetCode-style challenge. Try a new AI-assisted problem now and compare model approaches. https://codegrind.online
